entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a legume crop severely attacked by bruchid species during storage

entities.name: CICER ECHINOSPERMUM
entities.description: A species of Cicer screened for resistance to Callosobruchus chinensis

entities.name: CICER RETICULATUM
entities.description: A species of Cicer screened for resistance to Callosobruchus chinensis

entities.name: PULSE BEETLE
entities.description: Callosobruchus chinensis L., a bruchid species that attacks chickpea seeds during storage

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea accessions to withstand attack by the pulse beetle

entities.name: OVIPOSITION
entities.description: The number of eggs laid per seed by bruchid females, used to evaluate resistance

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The number of holes per seed resulting from adult beetle emergence, used to evaluate resistance

entities.name: DAMAGED SEED RATE
entities.description: The percentage of seeds damaged by the pulse beetle

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT LOSS
entities.description: The percentage of weight loss in seeds due to pulse beetle infestation

entities.name: HAIRY SEEDS
entities.description: Seed surface characteristic that may influence bruchid preference

entities.name: WRINKLED SEEDS
entities.description: Seed surface characteristic that may influence bruchid preference

entities.name: DARK SEEDS
entities.description: Seed color characteristic that may influence bruchid preference

entities.name: FREE-CHOICE TEST
entities.description: A laboratory test where beetles can choose between different host accessions

entities.name: NO-CHOICE TEST
entities.description: A laboratory test where beetles are restricted to a single host accession

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating multiple accessions for a specific trait like resistance

entities.name: STORAGE
entities.description: The environment or period during which chickpea is attacked by bruchid species

entities.name: HOST SELECTION
entities.description: The process by which the pulse beetle chooses a host for oviposition

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing new cultivars using resistant varieties as gene sources

relationships.description: attacks and causes losses in quantity and nutritional quality
attacks and is screened for resistance
